subject: Doug
text: Doug is the groom; the wedding is Sunday.

subject: Doug
text: At 9 PM, Doug was on the hotel roof.

text: At 9 PM, Doug was at the pool bar.

subject: Doug
text: Doug has now been found at the chapel.

subject: Doug
text: Doug never left the hotel suite all night.

subject: Doug
text: A taxi dropped Doug at the airport at 11 PM.
